title: ENTER RAA SPACE
description: RAA is a pop-up venue that hosts regular theatrical and contemporary performances, exhibitions and workshops. A little herbal shop offers the possibility to take in some Latvian forest in the centre of Riga.

telpa.paragraph1: RAA is a pop-up venue that hosts regular theatrical and contemporary performances, exhibitions and workshops. A little herbal shop offers the possibility to take in some Latvian forest in the centre of Riga.
telpa.paragraph2: Raa is raa. If it was something else it wouldn't be called so. In some fields of inquiry an argument that aims to establish a claim by proving that the contrary would lead to absurdity is called Reductio ad Absurdum, sometimes also abbreviated to RAA.
telpa.paragraph3: Had Raa been created on June 1st 2025 or later, it couldn't have been what it is now and besides who would create Raa after registering the domain raa.space?

program.openingEvent: We are having our opening event on the 11th of July. You are warmly invited. See the announcement on

register.title: REGISTER AT RAA SPACE
register.description: If you want to be part of the RAA Space, please enter your email below.

contact.location: We are located at Matīsa iela 8, Rīga.
